label: On Shared Number Dropped To At Most
description: Runs when a shared numeric value becomes low enough.
previewTemplate: When shared ${key} drops to at most ${maximum}

parameters.label: Key
parameters.description: Shared table key to watch as a number.

parameters.label: Maximum
parameters.description: Highest number that starts the connected nodes.

parameters.label: Check Every Seconds
parameters.description: How often the script checks the shared value.

beginnerSummary: When a shared score or counter becomes low enough, run the connected nodes.
